testcase.name: testUnitPriceMatchesDetailPage

failure.message: Cart unit price (5525.0) must match detail page price (55.25) expected [55.25] but found [5525.0]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Cart unit price (5525.0) must match detail page price (55.25) expected [55.25] but found [5525.0] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at testcase.name: testTaxIsPositive

failure.message: Tax % must be between 1–30. Got=0.18099547511312217% (tax=10.0 subtotal=5525.0) expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: testTotalEqualsSubtotalPlusShippingPlusTax

failure.message: Total (10525.0) must equal subtotal+shipping+tax (5525.0+40.0+10.0=5575.0) expected [5575.0] but found [10525.0]
